# config-stable-list-ids

Fails when a committed config file has an identity-bearing `listField` row
(`stableIdentity: true`) that lacks an explicit, non-empty string `id`, or whose
ids collide within one list. Such ids are used as durable external keys (e.g. a
DataView view id keys `data_view_row_order`), so a content-derived fallback id
would silently orphan that state when the row is edited or reordered.

Only **top-level** list fields are checked (views are top-level); nested
`objectField`/`listField` stable-identity lists are out of scope.
